description: GPT-4o powered autonomous security agent that continuously probes OWASP Juice Shop using tool calling

userStories.title: Project scaffold and configuration
userStories.description: Create Python project structure. Files: main.py, config.py, requirements.txt, findings/ directory. config.py must define: TARGET_URL='http://localhost:3000', LOOP_INTERVAL=30 (int, from env), MAX_TOOL_CALLS=50 (int, from env), DEMO_EMAIL, DEMO_PASSWORD (from env, default to Juice Shop demo creds), OPENAI_API_KEY (from env — raise clear error on startup if missing). requirements.txt includes: httpx, beautifulsoup4, openai. Create .env.example with all vars. findings/ directory created on startup if missing.
acceptanceCriteria: config.py exists with all required constants
Raises clear error on startup if OPENAI_API_KEY is missing
requirements.txt includes httpx, beautifulsoup4, openai
.env.example documents all env vars
findings/ directory created on startup if missing

userStories.title: HTTP tool definitions and OpenAI tool schemas
userStories.description: Create tools/http_tools.py with 3 functions: http_get(url, headers={}) -> dict returning {status, body, headers}; http_post(url, body, headers={}) -> dict returning {status, body, headers}; report_finding(title, severity, confidence, endpoint, description, evidence, remediation) -> dict that validates severity (low|medium|high|critical), saves to findings store, returns {id, saved: true}. All HTTP functions enforce 10s timeout via httpx and reject any host other than localhost:3000 (raise ValueError). Also export TOOL_SCHEMAS — list of OpenAI function-calling JSON schemas for all 3 tools.
acceptanceCriteria: tools/http_tools.py exists with http_get, http_post, report_finding functions
All HTTP requests enforce 10-second timeout
Any non-localhost:3000 URL raises ValueError
TOOL_SCHEMAS exported as list of valid OpenAI function schemas
report_finding validates severity field

userStories.title: Findings store — JSON persistence
userStories.description: Create findings/store.py with: save_finding(finding: dict) -> str that appends to findings/all_findings.json and returns UUID; load_all_findings() -> list[dict] that returns all findings or empty list if file missing; save_iteration_snapshot(findings: list[dict], iteration: int) that writes findings/iteration_{N}.json. Each finding must have: id (uuid4), title, severity, confidence, endpoint, description, evidence, remediation, timestamp. all_findings.json is never overwritten — only appended.
acceptanceCriteria: findings/store.py exists with save_finding, load_all_findings, save_iteration_snapshot
save_finding appends to all_findings.json and returns UUID
load_all_findings returns empty list if file missing
save_iteration_snapshot writes iteration_N.json without overwriting previous files
Each finding includes timestamp field

userStories.title: Auth module — Juice Shop login
userStories.description: Create auth/login.py with get_auth_token() -> str | None. POSTs to /rest/user/login with DEMO_EMAIL and DEMO_PASSWORD from config. Returns JWT string on success, None on failure with logged warning. Token returned to agent loop for use in Authorization: Bearer headers.
acceptanceCriteria: auth/login.py exists with get_auth_token()
POSTs to /rest/user/login with credentials from config
Returns JWT string on 200 response
Returns None on failure and logs warning without crashing

userStories.title: Discovery module — application surface crawler
userStories.description: Create discovery/crawler.py with crawl() -> dict. Uses httpx + BeautifulSoup to fetch http://localhost:3000 and follow same-origin links. Returns dict with: routes (list of str), api_endpoints (list of str — paths starting with /api/ or /rest/), forms (list of {action, method, inputs}), params (list of str). Returns empty dict with logged warning if Juice Shop is unreachable — does not crash.
acceptanceCriteria: discovery/crawler.py exists with crawl() returning correct dict structure
Only follows same-origin links
Returns empty dict (not error) if Juice Shop unreachable
Discovers at least /api/ and /rest/ endpoints when Juice Shop is running

userStories.title: GPT-4o agent loop — core probing engine
userStories.description: Create agent/runner.py with run_agent(surface: dict, token: str | None, previous_findings: list[dict], iteration: int) -> list[dict]. Builds system prompt with: role as elite red team agent, target URL, application surface (routes/endpoints/forms), summary of previous findings (titles + endpoints) for adaptive strategy, instructions to probe for XSS/IDOR/broken auth/sensitive data/missing headers, instruction to use report_finding for every confirmed vulnerability, constraint to use safe payloads only and localhost only. Calls openai.chat.completions.create() with model='gpt-4o' and TOOL_SCHEMAS as tools. Implements tool call execution loop: send messages → execute tool calls → append results → repeat until no more tool calls or MAX_TOOL_CALLS reached. Collects and returns all findings created via report_finding during the run. Handles OpenAI API errors gracefully.
acceptanceCriteria: agent/runner.py exists with run_agent() function
System prompt includes surface, previous findings, and security testing instructions
Calls GPT-4o with TOOL_SCHEMAS as tools
Implements full tool call execution loop until completion or MAX_TOOL_CALLS
Returns list of findings created via report_finding during the session
Handles API errors gracefully — logs and returns empty list

userStories.title: Reporting module — human-readable output
userStories.description: Create reporting/reporter.py with print_report(findings: list[dict], iteration: int). Prints formatted report to stdout with: header with iteration number, total findings count, list of findings with [SEVERITY] prefix, top risk (highest severity finding title), recommendations (remediation text per finding), and save path. Prints 'No new findings this iteration.' when list is empty. Does not crash on empty list.
acceptanceCriteria: reporting/reporter.py exists with print_report()
Prints iteration number and total findings count
Lists each finding with [SEVERITY] prefix
Shows top risk and recommendations
Prints 'No new findings this iteration.' when empty
Does not crash on empty list

userStories.title: Loop controller — main execution loop
userStories.description: Create/update main.py with run_loop() called at __main__ entry. Each iteration: (1) log '[Iteration N] Starting...', (2) call get_auth_token() — continue with None if fails, (3) call crawl() — if unreachable log error, sleep LOOP_INTERVAL, continue without crashing, (4) call load_all_findings() to get previous findings for agent context, (5) call run_agent(surface, token, previous_findings, iteration), (6) call save_iteration_snapshot(new_findings, iteration), (7) call print_report(new_findings, iteration), (8) sleep LOOP_INTERVAL seconds. All per-iteration exceptions are caught — loop never crashes. Ctrl+C exits cleanly with 'ChaosShield stopped.' Iteration counter resumes from last findings/iteration_N.json on startup.
acceptanceCriteria: main.py has run_loop() called at __main__
Iteration counter resumes correctly from findings/ directory
Unreachable Juice Shop logs error and continues loop without crash
All 6 steps run each iteration in correct order
Ctrl+C exits cleanly with 'ChaosShield stopped.'
Per-iteration exceptions do not stop the loop
